title: Aooshine Bedside Lamps, Dimmable Table Lamps with White Fabric Shade, Silver Base(Bulb Included)
features: [Touch Control Table Lamp – Instant Lighting at Your Fingertips]: No more fumbling for switches in the dark or waiting for bulbs to warm up. This charming touch-sensitive lamp responds instantly to a simple tap or slide, letting you turn it on/off or tweak brightness quickly. Suitable for all ages, it’s a straightforward lighting solution for your home.

[3-Way Dimmable – Set the Mood Anywhere]: Whether it’s bright enough for late-night reading on your bedside table, a soft glow for unwinding in the living room, or focused light for your home office desk, this versatile lamp adapts to every moment. Ideal for bedrooms, living spaces, and workstations – one lamp, multiple possibilities.

[Dual USB Charging Ports (A + Type-C)]: Charge two devices at once, even when the lamp is off. Keep your phone, tablet, or e-reader powered up without hunting for spare sockets or cluttering your space with extra chargers. Say goodbye to messy cables and hello to a tidier nightstand or desk.

[LED Bulb Included]: No need to hunt for a matching bulb – this bedside lamp comes with an E27 base Q50 3000K LED bulb. It emits a steady warm white light that’s gentle on the eyes, with no annoying flicker.

[Reassuring Shopping]: If you have any questions or advice about the touch bedside lamps, please feel free to contact us by e-mail, we will strive to provide you with the most friendly and efficient service!
description: Product Description The Aooshine bedside lamp adds a cozy touch to your bedroom. It features touch control, eliminating the need to awkwardly stretch for the switch. Measuring 4.4 inches in diameter and 14 inches in height, it doesn’t take up much space—making it perfect for narrow or small areas. Previous page Next page Minimalist Design to Spruce Up Your Space with Ease Previous page Next page You will have 2 charging ports with 5V 2A output. And you can use them to charge even when the table lamp is turned off. You no longer need extra power strips and have no more messy cables in your room. The usb lamp is a great item that saves space and time and improves the quality life. Thoughtful Functional Design Touch Control Ditch the knobs, old-fashioned switches and other cumbersome operations, this touch lamps bedside just need you simply touch the base to active the light. You can easily adjust the lighting to create the perfect ambiance for any situation instead of fumbling the switch in the darkness. Put this bedroom table lamps next to your bed, enjoy this touch bed lamp now. Previous page Next page 3 Way Dimmable Touch Lamp, Practical and Stylish Home Decoration Previous page Next page High-quality Linen Linen is strong and durable, ensuring that the shade will last for a long time. It diffuses light softly, perfect for creating a relaxing environment. Touchable Charging Base Since there are no physical switches to wear out, touch base can be safer and more durable. And the 2 built-in ports will make your life much easier! UK Plug Our touch lamps come with UK Plugs. The 1.5m cable is long enough to reach a corner power outlet. LED Bulb With a brightness of 3000K, this bulb produce bright, stable lighting with low heat generation. Our bedroom lamp is safe for your family's eyesight.
